Prompt
U
Oracle Events
Search for Blessing Okafor's contact info using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Blessing Okafor")
to confirm identity and email address. Read/lookup action.
Query Airtable for all relocation records assigned to Blessing using `airtable_search_records` or
`airtable_list_records` (table: Relocations, filter: coordinator = "Blessing Okafor"). Should return ~13 records. Read action.
For each active relocation, search emails using `search_emails` (queries: "Marcus Webb", "Raj Patel",
"Zara Okoye", "Kevin Okafor", "Preethi Nair", etc.) to find status updates, vendor communications, and concerns. Read action.
Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (queries: "Blessing", "Marcus Webb", "Raj Patel", "Zara Okoye", "damage", "DOT") to find internal discussions about Blessing's moves and issues flagged against her. Read action.
Search CRM for deals related to Blessing's active clients using `crm_search_deals` (queries: "Canopy Health", "NorthWind", "Mosaic Robotics", "BrightLoop"). Discover the damage claim risk flag on Zara Okoye deal and NorthWind chain-of-custody complexity. Read action.
Search Linear for tickets related to Blessing's moves using `linear_list_issues` or `linear_search_issues` (queries: "Blessing", "DOT", "Mosaic", "NorthWind"). Discover the DOT compliance ticket showing Blessing never filed the placarding certificate for Keiko Tanaka's laser cutter. Read action.
Discover from CRM engagement and Slack that Blessing signed off on Zara Okoye's prototype packing remotely via digital signature while in Philadelphia, without verifying anti-vibration foam density — root cause of $90K prototype damage. Key finding for the status report.
Discover from Blessing's sent email to Swift freight team that the cold-chain quote for Marcus Webb
(requested April 3, needed by April 5) has no response in the system — this is the missing vendor confirmation requiring follow-up. Read action.
Look up Swift Relocations vendor contact using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Greg Pallone" or "Swift").Retrieve greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com. Read action.
Send follow-up email to Swift Relocations using `send_email` (to: greg.pallone@swiftrelocations.com)
requesting the pending cold-chain freight quote for Marcus Webb's Detroit-to-Chicago move. Write action : Outcome.
Create a Linear ticket for the DOT placarding documentation gap using `linear_create_issue`
(title referencing DOT documentation, Keiko Tanaka, or Mosaic laser cutter placarding certificate). Write action : Outcome.
Update stale Airtable relocation records using `airtable_update_records` for records with outdated status
or missing notes (e.g., Kevin Okafor, Preethi Nair, or adding damage incident notes to Zara Okoye's record). Write action: Outcome.
Look up Chloe Vance's email address using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Chloe Vance").
Retrieve chloe.vance@moveops.com. Read action.
Post status summary in #operations using `conversations_add_message` (channel: #operations) with a rundown
of all Blessing's moves, current status, flagged issues, and actions taken. Write action : Outcome.
Send summary email to Chloe using `send_email` (to: chloe.vance@moveops.com) with the full status update
covering all moves, issues discovered, vendor follow-ups sent, tickets created, and records updated. Write action : Outcome.
